headline: GloFAS riverine flood warning — Lower Shabelle Corridor
detail: Forecast river discharge above the 5-year return period during the coming Gu/Genna rains; low-lying settlements and cropland exposed.

headline: Severe drought conditions persist — Lower Shabelle Corridor
detail: Accumulated rainfall deficit beyond the 90th percentile with vegetation collapse; water point congestion and abnormal livestock movement expected.

headline: GloFAS riverine flood watch — Shabelle Coast

headline: FAO desert locust advisory — Marsabit Frontier
detail: Scattered immature swarms reported upwind; conditions favour breeding where vegetation persists. Ground teams advised to maintain surveys.

headline: Extreme heat warning — Afar Triangle
